SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DIV.DIV_CO_NUMBER AS "CoNumber" , DIV.DIV_AMOUNT AS "Amount" FROM DIVIDENDS DIV WHERE DIV.CREATED = 'N' AND DIV.DIV_CO_NUMBER IN (SELECT CO.CO_NUMBER FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode})

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
